issues_found.description: Vlog inline template iframe lacks style='height: 100%;width: 100%;' attribute present in the actual _vlogs/2024-01-02-Bye-Bye-2023.md file. The CSS .video class sets container dimensions, but the iframe needs these inline styles to fill the container properly. Non-blocking since an AI using the skill can observe the real file and add the attribute.
Vlog template iframe is not indented inside <div class='video'> while the actual vlog file indents it with 4 spaces. Purely cosmetic source formatting difference.
